description: 幂等刷表/刷列：已存在则跳过。新增结构只改本文件，部署前先跑 DbSchemaMigrate.exe。

tables.name: Notifications
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Notifications" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Type" TEXT NOT NULL, "ThreadId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ThreadTitle" TEXT NOT NULL, "FromUserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "FromNickname" TEXT NOT NULL, "Content" TEXT NOT NULL, "Read" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL, "PostId" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Floor" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);

tables.name: ModerationLogs
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ModerationLogs" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "AdminId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "TargetType" TEXT NOT NULL, "TargetId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Action" TEXT NOT NULL, "Reason" TEXT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: LotterySpins
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "LotterySpins" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CostCoins" INTEGER NOT NULL, "PrizeCoins" INTEGER NOT NULL, "PrizePoints" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "PrizeLabel" TEXT NOT NULL, "IsFree" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: UserFollows
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "UserFollows" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "FollowerId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "FolloweeId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: UserBlocks
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "UserBlocks" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "BlockedUserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: Tags
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Tags" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Name" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: ThreadTags
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ThreadTags" ("ThreadId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "TagId" INTEGER NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY ("ThreadId", "TagId"));

tables.name: ShopItems
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ShopItems" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Sku" TEXT NOT NULL, "Name" TEXT NOT NULL, "Description" TEXT NOT NULL, "Currency" TEXT NOT NULL, "Price" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ItemType" TEXT NOT NULL, "Meta" TEXT NOT NULL, "SortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1);

tables.name: UserInventories
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "UserInventories" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ItemType" TEXT NOT NULL, "Meta" TEXT NOT NULL, "ExpiresAt" TEXT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL, "Quantity" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1);

tables.name: UserBadges
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "UserBadges" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "BadgeCode" TEXT NOT NULL, "EarnedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: UserTaskProgress
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "UserTaskProgress" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "TaskCode" TEXT NOT NULL, "Progress" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Target" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "Claimed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "ProgressDate" TEXT NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: Reports
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "Reports" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "ReporterId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "TargetType" TEXT NOT NULL, "TargetId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Reason" TEXT NOT NULL, "Status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', "HandledById" INTEGER NULL, "HandledAt" TEXT NULL, "HandleNote" TEXT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: ForumModerators
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ForumModerators" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "ForumId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: PollOptions
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "PollOptions" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "ThreadId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Text" TEXT NOT NULL, "Votes" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);

tables.name: PollVotes
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "PollVotes" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "ThreadId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "OptionId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: ThreadDrafts
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ThreadDrafts" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ForumId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Title" TEXT NOT NULL, "Content" TEXT NOT NULL, "Type" TEXT NOT NULL, "CoinPrice" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Tags" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL, "UpdatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: BrowseHistories
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "BrowseHistories" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ThreadId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ViewedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: ForumSubscriptions
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "ForumSubscriptions" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ForumId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "LastReadAt" TEXT NOT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: HomeBanners
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "HomeBanners" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Title" TEXT NOT NULL, "ImageUrl" TEXT NOT NULL, "LinkUrl" TEXT NOT NULL, "SortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: RechargePackages
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "RechargePackages" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Code" TEXT NOT NULL, "Name" TEXT NOT NULL, "Description" TEXT NOT NULL, "Price" REAL NOT NULL, "VipDays" INTEGER NOT NULL, "SortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "Enabled" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1);

tables.name: RechargeOrders
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "RechargeOrders" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "PackageId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "OrderNo" TEXT NOT NULL, "Amount" REAL NOT NULL, "Status" TEXT NOT NULL, "PaidAt" TEXT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: RechargeCards
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "RechargeCards" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Code" TEXT NOT NULL, "PackageId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "IsUsed" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "UsedById" INTEGER NULL, "UsedAt" TEXT NULL, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: SiteSettings
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "SiteSettings" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "Key" TEXT NOT NULL, "Value" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: FavoriteFolders
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "FavoriteFolders" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "UserId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Name" TEXT NOT NULL, "SortOrder" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

tables.name: PrivateMessages
tables.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "PrivateMessages" ("Id" INTEGER NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, "SenderId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "ReceiverId" INTEGER NOT NULL, "Content" TEXT NOT NULL, "IsRead" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "CreatedAt" TEXT NOT NULL);

indexes: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_Notifications_UserId_CreatedAt" ON "Notifications" ("UserId", "CreatedAt");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_ModerationLogs_TargetType_TargetId_CreatedAt" ON "ModerationLogs" ("TargetType", "TargetId", "CreatedAt");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_LotterySpins_UserId_CreatedAt" ON "LotterySpins" ("UserId", "CreatedAt");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_UserFollows_FollowerId_FolloweeId" ON "UserFollows" ("FollowerId", "FolloweeId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_UserBlocks_UserId_BlockedUserId" ON "UserBlocks" ("UserId", "BlockedUserId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_Tags_Name" ON "Tags" ("Name");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_ShopItems_Sku" ON "ShopItems" ("Sku");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_UserBadges_UserId_BadgeCode" ON "UserBadges" ("UserId", "BadgeCode");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_UserTaskProgress_UserId_TaskCode_ProgressDate" ON "UserTaskProgress" ("UserId", "TaskCode", "ProgressDate");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_ForumModerators_ForumId_UserId" ON "ForumModerators" ("ForumId", "UserId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_PollVotes_ThreadId_UserId" ON "PollVotes" ("ThreadId", "UserId");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_ThreadDrafts_UserId_ForumId" ON "ThreadDrafts" ("UserId", "ForumId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_BrowseHistories_UserId_ThreadId" ON "BrowseHistories" ("UserId", "ThreadId");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_ForumSubscriptions_UserId_ForumId" ON "ForumSubscriptions" ("UserId", "ForumId");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_HomeBanners_Enabled_SortOrder" ON "HomeBanners" ("Enabled", "SortOrder");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_RechargePackages_Code" ON "RechargePackages" ("Code");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_RechargeOrders_UserId_CreatedAt" ON "RechargeOrders" ("UserId", "CreatedAt");
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_RechargeCards_Code" ON "RechargeCards" ("Code");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "IX_PrivateMessages_SenderId_ReceiverId" ON "PrivateMessages" ("SenderId", "ReceiverId");
